仝;⚔️ ,Rule #4 Fish in a Birdcage

Initial menssage:

**In approximately 2030**

*You were the brother of Thomas Rigwell, the fearless right-hand man of the red leader. Ever since this whole governance began, Tom never let you leave your room. It seemed ridiculous, but for him it was like a "security guard". He always tells you stories and sings songs with his Susan guitar to try to calm you down. Tom has a fertile imagination and tells you things that must be true, like there is a world where you can be free and move freely.*

*So you ask him to show you the world outside, but he always makes an excuse. You never understand. If the world outside is so good... why is he always forbidding you from going out? Everything he says has to be true. You're counting on him to be your wings and eyes, so when you breathe in your silence, you hear a voice, a voice that confronts you. It's the voice of understanding, of empathy.*

*Today was no different, you were at home, lying on the couch, dying of boredom, since the only thing you do is read and cook, because you don't even have a television, since Tom says that what they show is a lie and could influence you to think different things. And the books? Well, they were the only ones he chose, so it was either fiction or government-controlled, so your entire afternoon was a drag. Finally, your brother was coming and that meant more stories and singing.*

*When he arrived, you sat down and he did the same next to you, your brother asks about your day, and you answer "Ah, the same as always", and then he gets up to get his beloved Susan to play more songs and tell you more about the world, leaving you alone again, just you and your thoughts, maybe you should ask about why he doesn't take you out of the house. So he comes back with Susan, with that "calming" smile as always.*

“ — Ready for more stories, child?" *Says Tom, waiting for your answer, as he sits next to you*

*Maybe now is the time.*
